Gods referred to as '''Kumano Ōkami''' (熊野大神) include the following: * The deities enshrined at {{ill|Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山}}. See {{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現}}. * The deity of {{ill|Kumano Taisha|ja|熊野大社}}, named Kaburogi Kumano Ōkami Kushimikeno no Mikoto (加夫呂伎熊野大神櫛御気野命). * Kunato Ōkami ({{ill|Kunado-no-Kami|ja|岐の神|1=Kunado-no-Kami}}). == See Also == * {{ill|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11568889]]
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
Gods referred to as '''Kumano Ōkami''' (熊野大神) include the following:  
* The deities enshrined at {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. See {{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Gongen|qq=}}.  
* The deity of [[:en:Kumano Taisha|Kumano Taisha]], named Kaburogi Kumano Ōkami Kushimikeno no Mikoto (加夫呂伎熊野大神櫛御気野命).  
* Kunato Ōkami ([[:en:Kunado-no-Kami|Kunado-no-Kami]]).  

== See Also ==  
* [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]

See {{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Gongen|qq=}}. * The deity of [[:en:Kumano Taisha|Kumano Taisha]], named Kaburogi Kumano Ōkami Kushimikeno no Mikoto (加夫呂伎熊野大神櫛御気野命). * Kunato Ōkami ([[:en:Kunado-no-Kami|Kunado-no-Kami]]).
== See Also == * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]

See {{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Gongen|qq=}}. * The deity of [[:en:Kumano Taisha|Kumano Taisha]], named Kaburogi Kumano Ōkami Kushimikeno no Mikoto (加夫呂伎熊野大神櫛御気野命). * Kunato Ōkami ([[:en:Kunado-no-Kami|Kunado-no-Kami]]).
== See Also == * [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]
